features: 💛【Great Material】The happy birthday banner is made of high-quality burlap, which are sturdy, durable and reusable. Happy birthday bunting is perfect for indoor and outdoor use.

💚【Banner Size】The size of each hessian bunting for happy birthday decorations is 13.5 cm x 18 cm, total length: 4.8 meters. There are 13pcs banners in total, and you can adjust the distance between each vintage burlap bunting.
💙【Vintage Style】The happy birthday banners cloth will definitely become an ideal decoration for your home, fireplace rack, wall or fireplace, and also a great background for birthday parties.
💜【Wide Application】This happy birthday bunting banner is suitable for many activities, such as photo shooting, activities, weddings, birthdays, party or home decoration.

🧡【What You Get】You will get a banner with "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" printed on burlap. Bunting banner can be used as a shooting prop to leave an unforgettable impression on your unique and exciting birthday party!
